CurrentIssues.ID: CyclomaticComplexMethod:ChannelOrderScreen.kt$@Composable private fun ChannelOrderRow( channel: LiveChannel, position: Int, isFirst: Boolean, isLast: Boolean, isHidden: Boolean, /** Active digits-buffer for this row, or null if no pending move targets us. */ pendingDigits: String?, onMoveUp: () -> Unit, onMoveDown: () -> Unit, onToggleHidden: () -> Unit, onAppendDigit: (Char) -> Unit, onPopDigit: () -> Unit, onCommitMove: () -> Unit, onCancelMove: () -> Unit, )

CyclomaticComplexMethod:HeroInfo.kt$@Composable fun HeroInfo( item: Content?, onPlay: (Content?) -> Unit, onDetails: (Content?) -> Unit, showControls: Boolean, /** Si false, HeroInfo NO pelea por el foco inicial — útil cuando hay * un foco previo guardado en otro sitio (p.ej. un rail tras back-nav) * que debe ganar la carrera. */ requestInitialFocus: Boolean = true, /** Total de slots del carousel (5 trending). 0 = no mostrar dots. */ carouselSize: Int = 0, /** Índice del slot que rinde actualmente. Solo se muestran dots si * el carousel realmente está activo (focusedItem null upstream). * Driven por HomeViewModel.heroSlideIndex. */ carouselIndex: Int = 0, /** Callback al pulsar ←/→ con foco en el botón Play. ±1 normalmente. */ onShiftSlide: (Int) -> Unit = {}, /** True cuando cualquier botón del hero (Play o Detalles) tiene foco * — usado por HomeScreen para decidir si el hero ocupa toda la * pantalla (true) o se reduce dejando ver los rails (false). */ onHeroFocusedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit = {}, /** FocusRequester del botón Play, hoisted al caller (HomeScreen) * para que el primer rail pueda apuntarlo en `focusProperties.up` * y la navegación ↑ desde un card vuelva al hero. Si es null * HeroInfo crea uno interno y la navegación ↑ depende del focus * engine por defecto. */ playFocusRequester: FocusRequester? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

CyclomaticComplexMethod:HomeScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalComposeUiApi::class) @Composable fun HomeScreen( viewModel: HomeViewModel, onOpenItem: (itemId: String, kind: MediaKind) -> Unit, onPlayItem: (itemId: String, resumePosSec: Long) -> Unit, onNavigateToTab: (Tab) -> Unit, onLogOut: () -> Unit, onOpenSettings: () -> Unit = {}, profileName: String? = null, authState: AuthState? = null, okHttpClient: okhttp3.OkHttpClient? = null, idleController: IdleController? = null, )

LongMethod:CertTrustDialog.kt$@Composable fun CertTrustDialog( challenge: CertChallenge, onTrust: (CertChallenge) -> Unit, onCancel: () -> Unit, )

LongMethod:ChannelOrderScreen.kt$@Composable private fun ChannelOrderRow( channel: LiveChannel, position: Int, isFirst: Boolean, isLast: Boolean, isHidden: Boolean, /** Active digits-buffer for this row, or null if no pending move targets us. */ pendingDigits: String?, onMoveUp: () -> Unit, onMoveDown: () -> Unit, onToggleHidden: () -> Unit, onAppendDigit: (Char) -> Unit, onPopDigit: () -> Unit, onCommitMove: () -> Unit, onCancelMove: () -> Unit, )

LongMethod:DetailScreen.kt$@Composable private fun HeroFull( item: Content, onPlay: (String, Long) -> Unit, onBack: () -> Unit, onToggleFavorite: () -> Unit, onToggleWatched: () -> Unit, onOpenCollection: (String) -> Unit, trailerResumeSec: Long = 0L, )
LongMethod:EpgRow.kt$@Composable private fun EpgProgramCell( program: EpgProgram, isLive: Boolean, now: Instant, onFocused: () -> Unit, onPlay: () -> Unit, )

LongMethod:HeroInfo.kt$@Composable fun HeroInfo( item: Content?, onPlay: (Content?) -> Unit, onDetails: (Content?) -> Unit, showControls: Boolean, /** Si false, HeroInfo NO pelea por el foco inicial — útil cuando hay * un foco previo guardado en otro sitio (p.ej. un rail tras back-nav) * que debe ganar la carrera. */ requestInitialFocus: Boolean = true, /** Total de slots del carousel (5 trending). 0 = no mostrar dots. */ carouselSize: Int = 0, /** Índice del slot que rinde actualmente. Solo se muestran dots si * el carousel realmente está activo (focusedItem null upstream). * Driven por HomeViewModel.heroSlideIndex. */ carouselIndex: Int = 0, /** Callback al pulsar ←/→ con foco en el botón Play. ±1 normalmente. */ onShiftSlide: (Int) -> Unit = {}, /** True cuando cualquier botón del hero (Play o Detalles) tiene foco * — usado por HomeScreen para decidir si el hero ocupa toda la * pantalla (true) o se reduce dejando ver los rails (false). */ onHeroFocusedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit = {}, /** FocusRequester del botón Play, hoisted al caller (HomeScreen) * para que el primer rail pueda apuntarlo en `focusProperties.up` * y la navegación ↑ desde un card vuelva al hero. Si es null * HeroInfo crea uno interno y la navegación ↑ depende del focus * engine por defecto. */ playFocusRequester: FocusRequester? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

LongMethod:HomeScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalComposeUiApi::class) @Composable fun HomeScreen( viewModel: HomeViewModel, onOpenItem: (itemId: String, kind: MediaKind) -> Unit, onPlayItem: (itemId: String, resumePosSec: Long) -> Unit, onNavigateToTab: (Tab) -> Unit, onLogOut: () -> Unit, onOpenSettings: () -> Unit = {}, profileName: String? = null, authState: AuthState? = null, okHttpClient: okhttp3.OkHttpClient? = null, idleController: IdleController? = null, )
LongMethod:HomeSidebar.kt$@Composable fun HomeSidebar( onNavigateToTab: (Tab) -> Unit, onOpenSearch: () -> Unit, onOpenSettings: () -> Unit, visibleTabs: Set<Tab>, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
LongMethod:HubplayNavGraph.kt$@Composable fun HubplayNavGraph( navController: NavHostController, startRoute: Route, container: AppContainer, )
LongMethod:LiveHero.kt$@Composable private fun HeroInfo( channel: LiveChannel?, nowProgram: EpgProgram?, nextProgram: EpgProgram?, nowInstant: Instant, )

LongMethod:LivePlayerChrome.kt$@Composable private fun InfoColumn( channel: LiveChannel?, title: String?, nowProgram: EpgProgram?, nextProgram: EpgProgram?, nowInstant: Instant, showInlinePosition: Boolean, channelPosition: Int, totalChannels: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

LongMethod:MiniEpgRail.kt$@Composable private fun MiniEpgCard( channel: LiveChannel, nowProgram: EpgProgram?, nowInstant: Instant, isCurrent: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, listState: LazyListState, indexInRail: Int, focusRequester: FocusRequester?, )

LongMethod:PlayerScreen.kt$@OptIn(UnstableApi::class) @Composable fun PlayerScreen( viewModel: PlayerViewModel, authState: AuthState, okHttpClient: OkHttpClient, idleController: com.alex.hubplay.data.IdleController, onBack: () -> Unit, )
LongMethod:SeriesScreen.kt$@Composable private fun EpisodeRow( episode: Content.Episode, onClick: () -> Unit, )

LongMethod:SeriesScreen.kt$@Composable private fun SeriesHeroFull( data: SeriesData, onPlay: (itemId: String, resumePosSec: Long) -> Unit, onShowEpisodes: () -> Unit, onBack: () -> Unit, onToggleFavorite: () -> Unit, )

LongMethod:SettingsScreen.kt$@Composable fun SettingsScreen( viewModel: SettingsViewModel, onBack: () -> Unit, onLogOut: () -> Unit, onForgetServer: () -> Unit, onChangeProfile: () -> Unit = {}, onReorderChannels: () -> Unit = {}, onOpenTrustedServers: () -> Unit = {}, )
LongMethod:TrailerHostOverlay.kt$private fun buildIframeHtml(videoKey: String, startAtSec: Long): String

LongParameterList:CatalogScreen.kt$( selectedTab: Tab, title: String, items: List<Content>, isLoading: Boolean, isLoadingMore: Boolean = false, canLoadMore: Boolean = false, error: String?, onRetry: () -> Unit, onLoadMore: () -> Unit = {}, onTabSelected: (Tab) -> Unit, onLogOut: () -> Unit, onSettings: () -> Unit = {}, cardContent: @Composable (Content) -> Unit, )

LongParameterList:ChannelOrderScreen.kt$( ui: ChannelOrderUiState, onSelectLibrary: (String) -> Unit, onMoveUp: (String, Int) -> Unit, onMoveDown: (String, Int) -> Unit, onToggleHidden: (String, String) -> Unit, onAppendDigit: (String, Char) -> Unit, onPopDigit: () -> Unit, onCommitMove: () -> Unit, onCancelMove: () -> Unit, )

LongParameterList:EpgRow.kt$( channel: LiveChannel, programs: List<EpgProgram>, now: Instant, isFavorite: Boolean, onFocused: (LiveChannel) -> Unit, onPlay: (LiveChannel) -> Unit, onToggleFavorite: (LiveChannel) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

LongParameterList:HeroInfo.kt$( item: Content?, onPlay: (Content?) -> Unit, onDetails: (Content?) -> Unit, showControls: Boolean, /** Si false, HeroInfo NO pelea por el foco inicial — útil cuando hay * un foco previo guardado en otro sitio (p.ej. un rail tras back-nav) * que debe ganar la carrera. */ requestInitialFocus: Boolean = true, /** Total de slots del carousel (5 trending). 0 = no mostrar dots. */ carouselSize: Int = 0, /** Índice del slot que rinde actualmente. Solo se muestran dots si * el carousel realmente está activo (focusedItem null upstream). * Driven por HomeViewModel.heroSlideIndex. */ carouselIndex: Int = 0, /** Callback al pulsar ←/→ con foco en el botón Play. ±1 normalmente. */ onShiftSlide: (Int) -> Unit = {}, /** True cuando cualquier botón del hero (Play o Detalles) tiene foco * — usado por HomeScreen para decidir si el hero ocupa toda la * pantalla (true) o se reduce dejando ver los rails (false). */ onHeroFocusedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit = {}, /** FocusRequester del botón Play, hoisted al caller (HomeScreen) * para que el primer rail pueda apuntarlo en `focusProperties.up` * y la navegación ↑ desde un card vuelva al hero. Si es null * HeroInfo crea uno interno y la navegación ↑ depende del focus * engine por defecto. */ playFocusRequester: FocusRequester? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

LongParameterList:HomeRail.kt$( title: String, items: List<T>, onFocused: (T) -> Unit, onClick: (T) -> Unit, style: CardStyle = CardStyle.Landscape, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, initialFocusedItemId: String? = null, railFocusRequester: FocusRequester? = null, )

LongParameterList:HomeViewModelTest.kt$HomeViewModelTest.FakeHomeRepository$( private val trending: List<Content> = emptyList(), private val continueWatching: List<Content.Resumable> = emptyList(), private val nextUp: List<Content.Episode> = emptyList(), private val liveNow: List<Content.LiveChannel> = emptyList(), private val layout: List<HomeRailConfig> = emptyList(), private val libraries: Map<String, String> = emptyMap(), private val throwOnAll: Boolean = false, private val throwOnContinueWatching: Boolean = false, )

LongParameterList:LiveHero.kt$( channel: LiveChannel?, nowProgram: EpgProgram?, nextProgram: EpgProgram?, nowInstant: Instant, authState: AuthState, okHttpClient: okhttp3.OkHttpClient, onAutoTune: ((LiveChannel) -> Unit)? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

MaxLineLength:HomeRepository.kt$HomeRepository$suspend fun fetchCatalogue(type: String, limit: Int = 60, offset: Int = 0, sortBy: String = "added_at", sortOrder: String = "desc"): List<Content>
ReturnCount:MeEventsStream.kt$MeEventsStream$private fun parse(eventType: String?, rawJson: String): MeEvent?
ReturnCount:PinnedCertTrustManager.kt$PinnedCertTrustManager$private fun classify(failure: CertificateException, leaf: X509Certificate): CertFailureReason

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:ChannelPreviewPlayer.kt$/** * How long the preview has to keep playing the same channel before * we auto-tune the user into the full-screen player. 8 s gives plenty * of room to D-pad away if the user just landed on this channel * mid-zap and doesn't actually want to commit — 5 s felt too eager. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:HomeViewModel.kt$HomeViewModel.Companion$// Refresh por SSE: subido de 1.5s → 5s. ProgressUpdated llega
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:HomeViewModel.kt$HomeViewModel.Companion$// Trailer: 500ms para evitar spam de loads en barrido rápido.
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:LanDiscovery.kt$LanDiscovery.Companion$// Matches the Go backend (internal/mdns/server.go): it registers
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:LiveHero.kt$/** Left-side content band (poster + info). Slight overlap with the * video band is desired — the fade gradient is what hides the seam. */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:LivePlayerChrome.kt$/** * Fixed total height of the bottom chrome — the scrim + content * column. Setting this lets us anchor the inner Row to the bottom of * a known rectangle so the layout doesn't jump up when the channel * has no logo. */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:MeEventsStream.kt$MeEvent.ChannelOrderUpdated$/** Marker event — another device of this user just changed channel order/visibility. */
ThrowsCount:PinnedCertTrustManager.kt$PinnedCertTrustManager$private inline fun evaluate( chain: Array<out X509Certificate>, peerHost: String?, delegate: () -> Unit, )

TopLevelPropertyNaming:HomeScreen.kt$/** * zIndex con el que el HomeSidebar se dibuja encima del rail vecino * cuando se expande. Cualquier valor > 1 sirve mientras no sea menor * que el del TrailerHostOverlay (que va más alto a nivel de app). */ private const val SidebarZIndex = 5f
TopLevelPropertyNaming:HomeSidebar.kt$/** Stops del horizontal gradient que da el "glass" look. */ private const val SidebarBgAlphaLeft = 0.96f

Wrapping:CertPinStore.kt$CertPinStore$(host, Pin( host = host, fingerprint = o.getString("fingerprint"), derBase64 = o.getString("der_base64"), subject = o.optString("subject"), issuer = o.optString("issuer"), notBefore = o.optLong("not_before"), notAfter = o.optLong("not_after"), addedAt = o.optLong("added_at"), ))
Wrapping:HomeScreen.kt$it?.let { item -> val resumeSec = (item as? Content.Resumable)?.resumePosSec ?: 0L onPlayItem(item.id, resumeSec) }
Wrapping:ScreensaverImageSource.kt$ScreensaverImageSource$ScreensaverSlide( id = it.id, backdropUrl = it.backdropUrl!!, title = it.title, year = it.year, )

Wrapping:TrailerHostOverlay.kt$(object { @JavascriptInterface fun onEnded() { mainHandler.post { host.reportEnded() } } @JavascriptInterface fun reportTime(seconds: Double) { mainHandler.post { hasTickedForCurrentKey = true host.reportPlaying() host.reportTime(seconds.toLong()) } } }, "TrailerBridge")
